creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 209976
update wxgtk31 to 3.1.3

Release Notes: https://github.com/wxWidgets/wxWidgets/blob/v3.1.3/docs/changes.txt#L143

Attached patch updates wxgtk31 to 3.1.3 and includes portrevision bumps for audio/audacity, comms/cubicsdr, graphics/electricsheep and lang/erlang-wx (pkg reported "needed shared library changed").

"Works for me" in poudriere and doesn't break erlang-wx (for wings, the only consumer of wxgtk31 I've at hand).
